feat(docker): multi-stage build + .dockerignore to shrink backend image

Before: 3.41 GB virtual / 648 MB compressed
After:  868 MB virtual / 185 MB compressed  (-71%)

Changes:
- Multi-stage build: gcc/build-headers in Stage 1 only, discarded
  from the final runtime image
- Install into isolated venv; COPY venv from builder (no recompile)
- .dockerignore: exclude .venv, tests/, __pycache__, .env, etc.
  (COPY layer shrank from 851 MB to 1.2 MB)
- Replace chown -R layer with COPY --chown flag (eliminates 852 MB dup)
- Runtime only needs libpq5 not libpq-dev (smaller footprint)
- Aliyun mirror + UV_HTTP_TIMEOUT=120 for reliable ARM64 downloads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: decompose SearchView into useSearchView hook + SearchResults component

SearchView.tsx was 1,220 lines — a zero-prop orchestrator with 13 useState,
8 useRef, 9 useEffect, 25+ custom hooks, and ~15 handler functions inline.

Extract all state/effects/handlers into useSearchView hook (~860 lines) and
the results rendering area into SearchResults component (~210 lines), leaving
SearchView as a thin ~320-line orchestrator that wires props.

Also consolidates three near-identical inline brush/pan callbacks into named
handleBrushSelect, handleFollowBrushSelect, and handlePan handlers.

Closes gastrolog-5xs8

Phase 2: MCP Platform — new servers, tool interchangeability configs

- Created ls-knowledge MCP server: RAG hybrid search, memory tier search,
  document ingestion, collection management (routes to Memory service)
- Created ls-infra MCP server: cluster health checks, GPU monitoring via
  nvidia-smi over SSH, LiteLLM model listing, Docker container status
- Added GPT-4.1 model to ls-inference routing table
- Created .mcp.json: all 5 MCP servers configured for Claude Code / Kimi Code
  using SSH transport with uv run for dependency management
- Created .codex/config.toml: Codex CLI configured to use local "coding"
  model via LiteLLM on VAULT:4000
- All servers use FastMCP 2.0, pyproject.toml, uv-managed venvs
- Verified: both new servers import and initialize cleanly

MCP servers now available:
  ls-inference  — Local + cloud model completions, embeddings, reranking
  ls-memory     — Cross-tool persistent memory (Redis-backed)
  ls-knowledge  — RAG search + memory tier search
  ls-workspace  — Project context, git history, file access
  ls-infra      — Cluster health, GPU status, Docker monitoring

feat(tasks): Показывать дату/время создания и автора внизу карточки задачи

## User Request (Original)
В разделе задачи в каждой задаче внизу слева указывать дату и время создания задачи и в скобочках кем создано

## Interpretation
На канбан-карточке задачи внизу слева показать дату/время создания (МСК) и имя создателя в скобках

## Actions Taken
- В renderKanbanCard() добавлена строка с датой создания и автором
- Формат: ДД.ММ.ГГГГ ЧЧ:ММ (Имя автора)
- Стиль: 11px, серый #aaa, отделение тонкой линией сверху

## Files Changed
- `ozon_app.py` — renderKanbanCard(): строка с created_at + creator_name

fix: load onboarding presets from static arrays instead of IndexedDB (#200)

For new users, IndexedDB may not be seeded yet when onboarding runs,
causing the Foods, Triggers, and Symptoms selection lists to appear
empty. Use the static PRESET_* arrays directly so lists always populate.

Fixes #198

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

#1060 Fix validation job max-turns failure (#1061)

## Issue

Closes #1060

## 概要

Claude Auto Review の Validation ジョブが `max-turns: 15` に到達して failure
になる問題を修正。
permission denial のリトライで turns が消費され、レビュー結果自体は APPROVED でもワークフローステータスが
FAILURE になっていた。
`max-turns` を 15 → 25 に増加し、permission denial のオーバーヘッドに対する余裕を確保した。

## 品質確認

- 設計・ドキュメント: セッションログ
`prompts/runs/2026-03/2026-03-06_0000_Validation-max-turns修正.md`。ADR
該当なし（既存設定の値変更のみ）
- Issue との整合: max-turns 増加（対応案1）を実施。permission denial 原因は調査済みで、モデル依存のため
max-turns 増加が実質的な対策
- テスト: N/A（CI ワークフロー設定の数値変更のみ、ユニットテスト対象外）
- コード品質（マイナス→ゼロ）: Verification の max-turns: 30 との整合性確認済み（25 < 30 で適切）
- 品質向上（ゼロ→プラス）: N/A（設定値変更のみ）
- UI/UX: N/A（バックエンド CI のみ）
- 横断検証: N/A（単一ファイル変更）
- `just check` + CI pass: S3 統合テストの失敗は MinIO 未起動による既存問題で本変更と無関係

## 確認項目

- [x] 変更が `.github/workflows/claude-auto-review.yaml` の `max-turns`
のみであること
- [x] 失敗した実行のデータ分析に基づく値設定（permission_denials: 8, 実質 turns: 8 → 25 で十分）

commit.message:
fix: remove autoplay+mute from YouTube embed so sound works on iOS

iOS YouTube iframes don't expose a software volume control — unmuting
is only possible via hardware buttons. Removing autoplay/mute means
the video plays with full audio when the user intentionally taps it.

commit.message:
Replace NetworkX with igraph backend for graph theory permutation testing

NetworkX (pure Python) took ~3.9s per permutation; igraph (C backend)
takes ~100ms — a 38x speedup that brings 66-pair × 1000-perm analysis
from 71 hours to ~2 hours per metric. Observed metrics for global_metrics.csv
still use full NetworkX (includes small-worldness); permutation null uses
igraph consistently for both observed and null differences.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(ui): add time-series charts, stats, load avg, and responsive layout

- What: Add TimeWindowAggregator (minute-resolution buckets for 24h) to
  all history structs (CPU, Memory, GPU, Disk, Network).
- What: Add line charts (ratatui Chart) for GPU detail, Disk I/O, and
  Network panels replacing sparklines where applicable.
- What: Add 1/6/12/24h avg/max stats for CPU, Memory, GPU; avg R/W for
  Disk; cumulative up/down for Network. Stats use compact x/x/x/x format
  and only show windows with enough elapsed data.
- What: Add load average (1/5/15m) and tasks (running/total) from
  /proc/loadavg to CPU info line.
- What: Add htop-style per-core CPU view (e key) with auto column count.
- What: Add network interface selection (n/N) and disk device selection
  (d/D) with highlighted row and chart/stats following selection.
- What: Add --net-max CLI flag to control max visible interfaces/disks.
- What: Sort network interfaces by up > type > throughput; sort disks by
  throughput descending.
- What: Fix network interface detection for mixed-case names (enP7s7).
- What: Make overview layout fully responsive to terminal height with
  adaptive section allocation and conditional chart/stats visibility.
- Why: Provide comprehensive monitoring with historical trends, enable
  users to focus on specific devices, and ensure usability across
  different terminal sizes.

Tests: cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy -D warnings, cargo test all pass.

commit.message:
Fix default path opening at / when no argument provided

macOS `open` launches apps with cwd=/, so when no path arg is passed
the Rust binary's default "." canonicalizes to /. Now injects cwd when
no positional path arg is given, in both resolvePathArgs() and the
installed launcher script.

Implement full Groups functionality mirroring the Cohorts pattern but with
key differences: no start/end dates, public visibility, self-service
join/leave, any user can create, and join announcements in chat.

- 6 new tables: groups, group_memberships, group_chat_messages,
  group_posts, group_post_comments, group_post_reads
- 6 new models with associations, validations, and scopes
- 3 Pundit policies (public show, any user creates, creator/admin edits)
- 5 controllers with full CRUD, join/leave, chat, posts, comments
- 17 new views including member/non-member show, system message variant
- Dashboard sidebar updated with My Groups list and Explore link
- 70 new controller tests with fixtures for all models
